modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to create Work Order due to missing trade in TMA.

full_description_text:  
I tried to create a Work Order in TMA but it won't let me. I keep getting an error saying this site has no trade available. It's really frustrating because I can't enter any data or save anything. Why is this happening?
short_description: Unable to create Work Order due to missing trade in TMA.
